title: AN ACT CREATING THE BARRIO OF BUROL IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF SAN NICOLAS, PROVINCE OF BATANGAS.

chunks.text:
H. No. 5113 / 53 OG No. 15, 5135 (August 31, 1957)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 1684, June 20, 1957 ]

AN ACT CREATING THE BARRIO OF BUROL IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF SAN NICOLAS, PROVINCE OF BATANGAS.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The sitio of Burol is separated from the barrio of Tambo, Municipality of San Nicolas, Province of Batangas, and constituted into a barrio in the said municipality to be known as the barrio of Burol.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 20, 1957.
